title: Ingoted Ores
description: Makes Coal, Diamond, Emerald, Quartz and Lapis into ingot.
body:
# Ingoted Ores

## Feature


### Texture changed: 

Coal -> Coal Ingot

Diamond -> Diamond Ingot

Emerald -> Emerald Ingot

Lapis -> Lapis Ingot

### Text changed: 

Coal -> Coal Ingot

Diamond -> Diamond Ingot

Emerald -> Emerald Ingot

Lapis -> Lapis Ingot

## Lang support

1. EN_US
1. ZH_CN
1. ZH_TW

## Naming Rules

Now Released versions:1.0, 1.1

> Suffix:

> P=Patch

> Q=Special Version(Something Changed and you need to find it)

## Texture making

### How to do it?

HandMade.

### Software?

GIMP 2.10.32
